## Summary

Fixes the empty space in the top-left of the evaluate page hero section. The heading and description text were pushed to the bottom of the grid (`lg:items-end`) while the evaluation tier cards sat at the top-right, creating an awkward gap. Now the text aligns to the top and a **Word Count Guide** card fills the remaining space with the publishing-standard word count tiers.

**Before:** Large empty space above "Begin manuscript evaluation." heading
**After:** Text at top, Word Count Guide card below showing Flash/Excerpt through Novel tiers

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `components/evaluation/EvaluateEntry.jsx` — hero grid alignment + new Word Count Guide card

**Does NOT touch:** Pipeline, evaluation logic, Story Ledger, base44

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- The word count ranges in the guide card match the `submissionScope.ts` boundaries (with novelette/novella from PR #769). If those boundaries change in the future, this card would need to be updated to match.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to evaluate page layout
